name: Mermaid State Diagram — Patient Treatment States
input: Create a state diagram showing patient treatment states: Initial Assessment, Diagnosed, Treatment Planning, Active Treatment, Monitoring, Remission or Relapse paths.
qualityCriteria: No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: State machine with transitions, branching paths, and circular loops.

data.syntax:
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Assessment
    Assessment --> Diagnosed
    Diagnosed --> Planning: Treatment plan
    Planning --> ActiveTx: Begin treatment
    ActiveTx --> Monitoring: Complete cycle
    Monitoring --> Remission: Positive response
    Monitoring --> Relapse: Disease progression
    Relapse --> Planning: Revise plan
    Remission --> FollowUp: Stable
    Remission --> ActiveTx: Recurrence
    FollowUp --> [*]: Discharged
data.caption: Patient treatment state machine showing progression and relapse pathways
